# Protos

These are Protocol Buffer source files generated by a [dumper tool](https://codeberg.org/Miniblox/dumpers).

## Manual fixes

Since I'm lazy, I can't be asked to fix these.

- Add an import to `protocol3.proto` in `protocol2.proto`
- Add a `SPacketTabComplete` message in `protocol2.proto`:
```proto
message SPacketTabComplete {
    required string message = 1;
}
```

## Ok, but how do I use this to make the generated files?

Run:
```sh
bunx buf generate
```
and it'll generate
